Pricing Packages

Transparent pricing for premium photography services

Signature

8 hours

$4,500

  • ✓Professional photographer
  • ✓High-resolution photos
  • ✓500+ edited images
  • ✓Cloud backup
  • ✓Web gallery access
Book Now

Most Popular

Premium Plus

12 hours

$6,200

  • ✓Everything in Signature
  • ✓Second photographer
  • ✓Engagement photos
  • ✓Videography (highlights)
  • ✓Premium album
  • ✓Unlimited gallery access
Book Now

Elite

16 hours

$8,500

  • ✓Everything in Premium Plus
  • ✓Drone photography
  • ✓Full-length video
  • ✓Multiple locations
  • ✓Print packages included
  • ✓VIP consultation
  • ✓Lifetime gallery access

  • Drone footage package$800

500+ Satisfied Clients · 15+ Years of Excellence

The Artist

About Daniel Silva

Premium Photography
Since 2009

Daniel Silva is a passionate photographer dedicated to capturing life's most important moments. With over 15 years of experience, he specializes in wedding, quinceañera, and event photography.

His approach combines technical expertise with artistic vision, ensuring every photo tells a story. Daniel believes in building genuine relationships with clients to understand and deliver on their unique vision.

When not behind the camera, Daniel mentors emerging photographers and explores new locations for stunning backdrops across the Southwest.

500+

Events Photographed

15+

Years of Experience

100%

Client Satisfaction
